import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; const TransactionForm = ({ onSubmit, onCancel, saving }) => { const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ title: '', amount: '', type: 'expense', category: '', paymentMethod: 'bank_transfer', notes: '', date: '', }); const handleChange = (e) => { setFormData({ ...formData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value }); }; const handleSubmit = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); onSubmit(formData); }; return (
